ops.text: capt-hook enforcement is silently OFF machine-wide: `uvx --isolated --from capt-hook hook run PreToolUse` exits 1 with "captain-hook signed host unavailable at /Applications/Captain Hook.app/Contents/Helpers/capt-hookd: [Errno 2] No such file or directory" before any pack code runs, so Claude Code fails open on every guard in every session. /Applications/Captain Hook.app exists only as a Spotlight ghost (no Contents/). Discovered 2026-07-23 while live-verifying the fail-open pack rewrite in cc-context — every live check "passed" because nothing was evaluating; a synthetic-event replay exposed it. The uvx pip shim floats to latest capt-hook, so either a new release started requiring the signed host or the app was removed/mid-update. Rebuild/reinstall the app (source: ~/Code/captain-hook/helper) or point the shim at a working host. Until then, guard-pack testing is only meaningful via `capt-hook test` / pytest, not live sessions.
